prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约5822→5631→5760→19998（2024年因选科调整出现不限组异常低位）→5610（2025年恢复至物化组正常水平），近4年正常年份位次稳 定在5600–5800区间，2025年基准约5610名；本省物理类计划2021年74人、2022年86人、2023年73人、2024年74人、2025年79人；2026年计划79人，与202 5年持平，无扩缩招变化。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第41名，近年排名稳定在40–43区间，属于全国顶尖211梯队；2026年声誉评价偏负面（曾发生实验室安全事故历史事件），但属较早事件，对当前报考心理影响有限；抖音热度排名第45位（较热），短视频平台有一定关注度，未见明显报考 降温信号；无投档线断档记录；系统科学A+（全国第一）、交通运输工程A、信息与通信工程A、计算机科学与技术A-、土木工程A-、管理科学与工程A-，共6个A -及以上学科，学科实力突出，对理工类考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等核心专业2024–2026年持续高热推荐，社会热度高；福建 省2026年高考总人数267900人，按近年物理类占比约76%估算约203604人，较2025年（192096人）增加约11508人（+6%），考生规模扩大加剧竞争，2025年物理 类本科批441分、特殊类型线520分，近年波动不大；北京交通大学位于北京，属一线城市高校，对福建考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在全国招生中福建省占比约 3–4%，属中等招生规模省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次在5600–5800区间窄幅波动、2026年招生计划持平、福建省物理类考生增加约6%以及计算机/电子信息等热门专业持续 高热等因素，预计2026年竞争较2025年略有加剧，位次小幅后移。预测最低位次约5710名，区间5210–6210名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间5210–6210名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<5210名）可重点冲击詹天佑试点班和计算机类等王牌专 业；位次接近区间上限（>6210名）建议以三档专业稳妥保底，同时关注二档中交通运输类等传统优势专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 5822 → 5631 → 5760 → 19998 (in 2024, due to subject selection adjustments, an abnormally low ranking appeared in the unrestricted group) → 5610 (in 2025, returned to normal level of the Physics-Chemistry group). In the past 4 normal years, the ranking remained stable in the 5600–5800 range, with a baseline of about 5610 in 2025. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 74 in 2021, 86 in 2022, 73 in 2023, 74 in 2024, and 79 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 79, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 41st in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 40–43 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of 211 universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (due to a historical laboratory safety accident), but it is an earlier event with limited impact on current application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 45th (relatively hot), with some attention on short video platforms, no obvious signal of cooling in applications. No record of admission cutoff line gaps. System Science A+ (first in the country), Transportation Engineering A, Information and Communication Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, a total of 6 A- and above disciplines, with outstanding disciplinary strength, strong appeal to science and engineering candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering have been continuously hot and recommended from 2024 to 2026, with high social popularity. The total number of Fujian Province college entrance examination candidates in 2026 is 267,900, estimated at about 203,604 for Physics Category based on the recent proportion of about 76%, an increase of about 11,508 (+6%) compared to 2025 (192,096), with expanded candidate scale intensifying competition. In 2025, the Physics Category undergraduate batch line was 441 points, and the special type line was 520 points, with little fluctuation in recent years. Beijing Jiaotong University is located in Beijing, a first-tier city university, with strong regional appeal to Fujian candidates. The university's enrollment in Fujian Province accounts for about 3–4% of its national enrollment, making it a medium-scale enrollment province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the narrow fluctuation of historical rankings in the 5600–5800 range, the unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, the approximately 6% increase in Physics Category candidates in Fujian Province, and the continued high popularity of hot majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information, it is expected that competition in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025, with rankings slightly shifting backward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 5710, with a range of 5210–6210.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Science Experimental Class (Zhan Tianyou Pilot Class Information/Intelligence)
- Computer Science
- Electronic Information
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Automation (Intelligent Systems and Intelligent Manufacturing)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Statistics/Intelligent Optoelectronics)
- Transportation
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Robotics Engineering (Zhixing Innovation Class)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted ranking range of 5210–6210, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<5210), focus on aiming for flagship majors such as the Zhan Tianyou Pilot Class and Computer Science. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>6210), it is recommended to safely use Tier 3 majors as a fallback, while also paying attention to traditional advantageous majors in Tier 2 such as Transportation.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年历史类最低位次约1430→1514→1610→1739→1631，整体呈缓慢后移趋势，近5年累计后移约200名；2025年基准约1631名；本省历史类 计划2021年7人、2022年12人、2023年8人、2024年9人、2025年5人；2026年计划7人，较2025年增加2人（扩招40%），扩招幅度较大，有利于降低竞争烈度。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第41名，属全国顶尖211，对文科考生同样有较强吸引力；2026年声誉评价偏负面（实验室安全事故历 史），但属理工类事件，对历史类报考影响有限；抖音热度排名第45位（较热），整体关注度一般；无投档线断档记录；系统科学A+、管理科学与工程A-等虽偏 理工，但法学、外国语言文学等文科招生专业依托学校整体平台，具有一定竞争力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业热度2024–2026年分化观望，文科试验班（经济管理）热度 一般；福建省2026年历史类考生按近年占比约24%估算约64296人，较2025年（60252人）增加约4044人（+6.7%），考生规模扩大，近年波动不大；北京作为一线城市，对福建文科考生有较强吸引力；该校在福建省历史类招生人数较少（5–12人），属于小规模招生，位次波动相对敏感。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历史类位次缓慢后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招40%（从5人增至7人）以及福建省历史类考生增加约6.7%等因素，扩招幅度大于考生增幅，预计竞争略有缓和 ，但位次不会大幅前移。预测最低位次约1972名，区间1716–2228名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1430 → 1514 → 1610 → 1739 → 1631, showing a slow backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 200 places in the past 5 years; the 2025 baseline is about 1631 places; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 7 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 8 in 2023, 9 in 2024, and 5 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 7, an increase of 2 (40% expansion) compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and helps reduce competition intensity.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 41st in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, belonging to the top-tier 211 universities, which also has strong appeal to liberal arts candidates; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (history of laboratory safety incidents), but this is a science and engineering incident, with limited impact on History Category applications; Douyin popularity ranking is 45th (relatively popular), with overall attention being average; no record of admission cutoff line gaps; System Science A+, Management Science and Engineering A-, etc., are more science and engineering oriented, but liberal arts majors such as Law and Foreign Languages and Literature rely on the overall platform of the school and have certain competitiveness.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major popularity from 2024 to 2026 shows divergence and wait-and-see; Liberal Arts Experimental Class (Economics and Management) has average popularity; in 2026, Fujian Province's History Category candidates, estimated at about 24% of the total, are approximately 64,296, an increase of about 4,044 (+6.7%) compared to 2025 (60,252), with the candidate pool expanding and little fluctuation in recent years; Beijing, as a first-tier city, has strong appeal to Fujian liberal arts candidates; the university enrolls a small number of History Category students in Fujian Province (5–12), which is a small-scale enrollment, making ranking fluctuations relatively sensitive.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slow backward trend of History Category rankings, the significant 40% expansion in 2026 (from 5 to 7), and the approximately 6.7% increase in Fujian Province's History Category candidates, the expansion rate exceeds the candidate growth rate, so competition is expected to ease slightly, but rankings will not move forward significantly. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1972, with a range of 1716–2228.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Law
- Liberal Arts Experimental Class (Economic Management Talent Pilot Class) (including Business Administration, Accounting)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: History Category only offers two majors: Law and Liberal Arts Experimental Class. With rankings within the predicted range of 1716–2228, it is recommended to aim for Law as a Tier 1 sprint and Liberal Arts Experimental Class as a safe choice. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1716), Law can be a primary consideration; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (>2228), careful evaluation is needed, and it is advisable to pair with other universities as a safety net.
